item.title: nRF52840 USB dongle
item.description: Product Page nRF52840 ARM M4 64 MHz 1024 KB ROM - 256 KB RAM Bluetooth 5, Mesh 802.15.4, Thread, Zigbee USB 2 GetStarted) Applications # custom mesh coordinator nRF52840 Dongle # Serial wire debug pinout # pogo pin adapter # STL models zip
